name: edit-values
description: Reads and writes individual world/player NBT values вҖ” gamemode, position, a custom tag вҖ” through the hidden nbt tool, always overviewвҶ’backupвҶ’getвҶ’setвҶ’verify. Use when the user wants to change one save value in place ("ж”№еқҗж Ү","ж”№жЁЎејҸ","жёёжҲҸжЁЎејҸ","ж”№ж•°жҚ®","nbt"); moving a whole player's data or computing UUIDs is transfer-player-data.
body:
NBT tools hidden by default вҖ” confirm the user enabled "NBT е·Ҙе…·" in AI и®ҫзҪ®; if not, tell them
to enable it and stop.

Order, always:
1. `instance(action=worlds_info, world)` or `nbt(action=read, ...)` for an overview. World must
   NOT be open in-game вҖ” tools detect the session lock; ask the user to quit, don't retry.
2. `instance(action=worlds_backup_create, world)`, even if auto-backup also runs.
3. `nbt(action=get, ..., nbtPath)` вҖ” read the EXACT current value, show old vs new, `ask()` to
   confirm anything non-obvious.
4. `nbt(action=set, ..., nbtPath, value)` вҖ” one logical change per call. Keep types exact:
   gamemode is int (0 survival/1 creative/2 adventure/3 spectator); `Pos` is 3 doubles.
5. `nbt(action=get, ...)` again to verify, report the confirmed value.

Never edit NBT via shell/hex вҖ” only `nbt` actions keep compression and atomic writes correct.
